parsed.production_notes: The video features natural human movements, realistic lighting, and genuine facial expressions and laughter. There are no artifacts typical of AI generation, such as uncanny features or unnatural physics.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, plain white walls, two gaming chairs (one black, one green/black).

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man and woman sit side-by-side in gaming chairs against a plain white wall. The man is on the left, wearing a white t-shirt, and the woman is on the right, wearing a black top. They are looking down towards the center, interacting with a device held by the woman. The man speaks first, looking slightly unsure. The woman then speaks, smiling. They both appear relaxed and engaged in the activity.

scenes.visual_description: The couple is shown from the chest up, sitting together. A large app interface overlay is positioned in the lower center of the screen, showing pronunciation feedback. Text overlays label the man and woman. The man tries to pronounce a word, and the app shows a low score. The woman then pronounces it, and the app shows a high score.
